extraction.one_line_summary: DÉMARE Arnaud won Paris-Nice Stage 1 by attacking 300m from the line on wet cobbles after breakaway caught at 14km to go
tactical_patterns: DÉMARE attacked at 300m not 200m on uphill cobbled finish, exploiting wet conditions for surprise move against hesitant punchers.
Late crash at 14km involving 10 riders eliminated GC contenders like DE SOUZA, opening door for opportunistic stage hunters.
IZAGUIRRE resisted DÉMARE's 300m attack and nearly caught him, showing pure climbers can challenge on short cobbled uphill finishes.

rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: positive: Won uphill cobbled finish despite being labeled pure sprinter, reveals adaptability beyond flat bunch kicks
rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: negative: Attacked solo in final kilometer on wet cobbles but faded badly, poor tactical judgment for terrain
rider_signals.VAN GARDEREN Tejay: negative: Abandoned after only 100km on opening stage, signals major form or health concerns pre-race
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: neutral: Hyped as stage favorite for 'customized' profile but invisible in finale, possibly marking for later stages
